prompt:
A compact 20 W LED grow light panel hangs over a small tray of seedlings and herbs, its thin rectangular body suspended by simple metal wires from an adjustable bar. The panel surface glows with a soft, full-spectrum white-pink light, casting gentle illumination on the plants below and clearly covering a modest 0.2 m² grow area. A slim 12 V power adapter brick and cable are visible along the side of the setup, emphasizing that this is a low-power kit intended for starter hydroponic or soil grows.

The scene sits in a near-future solarpunk indoor garden corner, with other leafy plants in the background and a mix of natural daylight and the panel’s glow creating soft, cinematic lighting. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with light stylization, no brand logos or readable text on the lamp or adapter, and a clean composition that centers the glowing panel and its small, well-lit plant tray while the rest of the room remains gently out of focus.
